description: Wingtip brogueing on tapering leather loafers for men is the latest tongue-in-cheek statement from arrow at more conventional styles. These slip-on shoes add a roguish twist to your conventional formal ensemble. Upper Leather upper with brogueing (perforations) on the toe box Reinforced overlay on the low-cut heel for support to the ankle Slip on styling with elasticated seams on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearability Leather lining Padded tongue Soft sockliner for instep comfort Brand badge on the midfoot Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Terraced grooves on the midfoot for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
